title: dianthus marisensis
intro: Dianthus marisensis, also known as the Sea Pink or Maritime Pink, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family and is native to coastal areas in Europe and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are said to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Dianthus marisensis are attributed to its ability to protect against oxidative stress, promote skin health, and support the immune system. Dianthus marisensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and creams, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
